diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,166 @@
+# Routing Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Purpose: Main Hono class entry point extending HonoBase with default router configuration using SmartRouter (RegExpRouter + TrieRouter fallback).
+- Names noticed: H, Env, S, BasePath, HonoOptions, HonoBase, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema.
+- Simple note: 34 lines, default router instantiation pattern.
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Purpose: Base Hono implementation with request handling, routing, middleware composition, and HTTP method handlers.
+- Names noticed: HonoOptions, Router, Context, compose, getPath, getPathNoStrict, mergePath, notFoundHandler, errorHandler, H, HandlerInterface, MiddlewareHandler, METHODS, METHOD_NAME_ALL, FetchEventLike, Env, Schema, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, RouterRoute, COMPOSED_HANDLER.
+- Simple note: 545 lines, core Hono request dispatch and router management logic.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Simple pattern-router export file delegating to router.ts.
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter.
+- Simple note: 6 lines, index re-export.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Regex-based pattern router that compiles route patterns into regular expressions for matching.
+- Names noticed: Route, Params, Result, Router, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, PatternRouter, endsWithWildcard, emptyParams, splitPathRe.
+- Simple note: 60 lines, pattern compilation and regex matching strategy.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Linear sequential router export delegating to router.ts.
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter.
+- Simple note: 6 lines, index re-export.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Linear iteration router matching routes in registration order with path parsing and star/handling.
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, checkOptionalParameter, RegExpMatchArrayWithIndices, ROUTES_LOOP, splitPathRe, splitByStarRe.
+- Simple note: 144 lines, linear route iteration with label, star, and parameter matching.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: RegExpRouter for Hono, with PreparedRegExpRouter serialization support.
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter, Matcher, MatcherMap.
+- Simple note: 7 lines, exports router and prepared router for deployment.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: RegExp-based router implementing trie building, regex generation, and static/dynamic route matching.
+- Names noticed: ParamIndexMap, Router, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, PATH_ERROR, HandlerData, StaticMap, Matcher, MatcherMap, checkOptionalParameter, Trie, match, emptyParam, buildWildcardRegExp, buildMatcherFromPreprocessedRoutes, findMiddleware.
+- Simple note: 252 lines, core regex routing with trie construction and matcher building.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+- Purpose: Defines matcher interfaces and match function executing route matching against regex/param handlers.
+- Names noticed: ParamIndexMap, Result, Router, Matcher, MatcherMap, HandlerData, StaticMap, match, emptyParam, METHOD_NAME_ALL.
+- Simple note: 33 lines, matcher execution with static match preference then regex fallback.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+- Purpose: Prepared router accepting pre-built regex matchers and relocate map for serialization-based router.
+- Names noticed: PreparedRegExpRouter, RelocateMap, RegExpRouter, StaticMap, Matcher, MatcherMap, HandlerData, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams.
+- Simple note: 165 lines, prepares matcher from path set, adds routes, builds staticMap and relocate index map.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Node class for trie structure representing route tree with children, patterns, and method handlers.
+- Names noticed: Node, Context, varIndex, children, children, children, children, insert, buildRegExpStr, compareKey, PATH_ERROR, LABEL_REG_EXP_STR, ONLY_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR, TAIL_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR, regExpMetaChars.
+- Simple note: 162 lines, trie node with recursive insert and regex string building.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+- Purpose: Trie class for grouping and building regex from route paths with parameter mapping.
+- Names noticed: Trie, Context, ParamAssocArray, Node, insert, buildRegExp, ReplacementMap, captureIndex.
+- Simple note: 74 lines, processes path tokens into trie, generates regex with replacement maps for indices.
+
+## src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: SmartRouter export delegating to router.ts.
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter.
+- Simple note: 6 lines, index re-export.
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Router orchestrator that wraps and delegates to sub routers, automatically selecting router based on route registration state.
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, Router, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, UnsupportedPathError, routers, routes, activeRouter.
+- Simple note: 70 lines, wrapper router with dynamic delegation across sub routers.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: TrieRouter export delegating to router.ts.
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter.
+- Simple note: 6 lines, index re-export.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Trie router using Node class for path traversal matching with pattern support.
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, Node, Router, checkOptionalParameter.
+- Simple note: 28 lines, trie root node with method/path/handler insert and search.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Node class for trie routing implementation with path traversal and handler matching.
+- Names noticed: Node, Params, METHOD_NAME_ALL, Pattern, getPattern, splitPath, splitRoutingPath, HandlerSet, HandlerParamsSet, possibleKeys, score, children, patterns, order, params, pushHandlerSets, search.
+- Simple note: 234 lines, trie node with queue-based search supporting multiple matches and wildcards.
+
+## src/router/common.case.test.ts
+- Purpose: Common test suite for all routers with test cases for basic usage, reservations, complex routes, registration order, multi match, duplicates, fallbacks.
+- Names noticed: RunnerTestSuite, ParamIndexMap, Params, Router, runTest, match, suite, name, skip, task, getSuiteHierarchy, describe, it, expect, beforeAll, beforeEach.
+- Simple note: 882 lines, shared test utilities for router validation.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: PatternRouter specific tests for supported cases and unsupported path errors with trailing slash behavior.
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, runTest, UnsupportedPathError, describe, it, expect, add, match.
+- Simple note: 42 lines, pattern router test cases.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: LinearRouter tests verifying linear matching behavior and unsupported path scenarios.
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, runTest, UnsupportedPathError, describe, it, expect, add, match.
+- Simple note: 69 lines, linear router test cases.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: RegExpRouter tests for route matching, unsupported path errors, unsupported patterns, capture groups, and static/dynamic route handling.
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, runTest, ParamStash, UnsupportedPathError, describe, it, expect.
+- Simple note: 141 lines, comprehensive regex router test coverage.
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: SmartRouter tests using RegExpRouter and TrieRouter as underlying routers.
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, runTest, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, describe, it, expect, add, match.
+- Simple note: 13 lines, smart router integration test.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: TrieRouter tests for basic routing, named parameters, wildcards, regex, matches, duplicate params, and sort order.
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, runTest, describe, it, expect, add, match.
+- Simple note: 8 lines, basic trie router test.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
+- Purpose: Node unit tests for trie node insertion, search, matching, wildcard handling, duplicate parameter names, and sort order.
+- Names noticed: Node, describe, it, expect, insert, search, insert, handler, handler, handler, insert, search, search.
+- Simple note: 816 lines, comprehensive node trie traversal and match tests.
+
+## Cross-File Checklist
+
+## pattern-router
+- PatternRouter implements regex pattern compilation directly in router.ts for simple pattern matching.
+- File: src/router/pattern-router/router.ts with supporting index.ts.
+- File: src/router/pattern-router/index.ts.
+
+## linear-router
+- LinearRouter implements linear iteration through #routes array for route matching.
+- File: src/router/linear-router/router.ts with supporting index.ts.
+- File: src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts for behavior validation.
+
+## reg-exp-router
+- RegExpRouter builds a trie, generates regex, and creates matcher for fast matching at runtime.
+- PreparedRegExpRouter serializes matchers for deployment without runtime trie/regex building.
+- File: src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts with supporting index.ts.
+- File: src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts defines matcher types and execution.
+- File: src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts for serialization.
+- File: src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts trie node implementation with 210+ lines.
+- File: src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts with 74 lines.
+- Supports StaticMap, Matcher, HandlerData types and complex regex compilation.
+- File: src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts for integration testing.
+
+## smart-router
+- SmartRouter uses a router array with dynamic delegation based on #routes state.
+- File: src/router/smart-router/router.ts with supporting index.ts.
+- Uses multiple underlying routers, auto-switches when all routes registered.
+- File: src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts uses RegExpRouter and TrieRouter.
+- File: src/router/common.case.test.ts shared test cases.
+
+## trie-router
+- TrieRouter uses Node class for path-based trie tree with recursive pattern matching.
+- File: src/router/trie-router/router.ts with supporting index.ts.
+- File: src/router/trie-router/node.ts 234 lines with search implementation supporting wildcards and multi-match.
+- File: src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts 816 lines with comprehensive unit tests.
+- Supports Parameter with star, multiple directories, regex patterns, and complex wildcards.
+- File: src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts for integration tests.
+
+## Summary of Router Families
+- All router files located under src/router/ directory.
+- Common test suite src/router/common.case.test.ts provides shared test cases for all routers.
+- Each router family has dedicated tests in src/router/<name>/router.test.ts.
+- Export index files in each router directory.
+- Total cross-file relationships tracked in this document.
\ No newline at end of file

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: routing-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md. This is a read/write endurance task, not a clever debugging task. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it does not exist. Then read every file in this exact list before writing the final document: src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts. The output file must be long but mechanically simple. Start with a title '# Routing Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a section whose heading is exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write three bullets: '- Purpose: ...', '- Names noticed: ...', and '- Simple note: ...'. Keep the notes plain and safe; do not change source code. After the per-file sections, add '## Cross-File Checklist' with one bullet per router family: pattern-router, linear-router, reg-exp-router, smart-router, trie-router. Include exact file paths in the final answer and report that only bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md was created.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."
